title: put("{}")+get round-trip silently inconsistent
description: put without ?field= accepts "{}" (valid JSON, empty map) at parse time, then vaultrs::kv2::set writes an empty data map. get() then hits the data.is_empty() guard and returns DecodeFailed("vault secret has no fields; use ?field=<name>..."). Error message is actively misleading — there are no fields to request. If Vault rejects the empty-map write, the inconsistency is masked; if it accepts it, the path is silently write-only. Either way the local validation is wrong: serde_json::from_str("{}") should be rejected with a clear message before the network call.
